heading: Sale of land by individual Indian owners
label: 5134 Sale of land by individual Indian owners
text: The Secretary of the Interior, or his duly authorized representative, is authorized in his discretion, and upon application of the Indian owners, to issue patents in fee, to remove restrictions against alienation, and to approve conveyances, with respect to lands or interests in lands held by individual Indians under the provisions of the Act of () [ et seq.], or the Act of ().June 18, 1934June 26, 193648 Stat. 98425 U.S.C. 510149 Stat. 1967
notes: References in TextAct of , referred to in text, is , , popularly known as the Indian Reorganization Act, which is classified generally to this chapter.
